description_for_model: DPX is a programmable stablecoin settlement rail for AI agents. Validated integrations: Coinbase AgentKit (CDP MPC wallet), Circle Developer Wallets, LangChain, MCP. Discovery-first protocol: call GET /manifest to discover capabilities cold, GET /reliability for oracle status, GET /quote to price a settlement, POST /settle to execute. Native x402 micropayment support on Base. Fees: 0.85% core + 0.40% FX (cross-currency only) + 0.00–0.50% ESG (live from oracle) + 0.01% license.
description_for_human: Real-time DPX stablecoin stability oracle with agent-native pricing, ESG-weighted fees, and programmable settlement rails on Base mainnet.
